languages.text: Когда-то 32-ой меровский штрафной легион служил Себериану. Капитан-интендант просила обновить их клятвы и вновь взять на службу. Однако полковник Батошски не рад этому. Остается надежда на то, что его уважение можно завоевать.

The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.
languages.original_text: Когда-то 32-ой меровский штрафной легион служил Себериану. Капитан-интендант просила обновить их клятвы и вновь взять на службу. Однако полковник Батошски не рад этому. Остается надежда на то, что его уважение можно завоевать.

traits.locale_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

languages.text: 32番メローフ連隊はかつてシベリアで活躍した。その隊長は、誓いを新たにして再び軍役に就くよう要請した。しかし、バトシュスキー大佐はそれを快く思っていない。それでも、大佐の心を動かせるかもしれない。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

traits.locale_text: 32番メローフ連隊はかつてシベリアで活躍した。その隊長は、誓いを新たにして再び軍役に就くよう要請した。しかし、バトシュスキー大佐はそれを快く思っていない。それでも、大佐の心を動かせるかもしれない。

languages.text: El 32.º regimiento penal de Merov sirvió a Seberian. La capitana-intendente ha solicitado retomar sus juramentos y su servicio, pero al coronel Batoshski no le gusta la perspectiva. Sin embargo, hay esperanzas de que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán se gane su respeto.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

traits.locale_text: El 32.º regimiento penal de Merov sirvió a Seberian. La capitana-intendente ha solicitado retomar sus juramentos y su servicio, pero al coronel Batoshski no le gusta la perspectiva. Sin embargo, hay esperanzas de que {mf|el|la} Lord Capitán se gane su respeto.

languages.text: Das 32. merovianische Strafregiment unterstand einst Seberian. Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin hat darum gebeten, die Eide der Soldaten zu erneuern und sie wieder in Dienst zu stellen. Colonel Batoshski ist davon allerdings wenig begeistert. Es besteht aber Hoffnung, dass der Lord Captain seinen Respekt verdienen kann.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

traits.locale_text: Das 32. merovianische Strafregiment unterstand einst Seberian. Die Captain-Quartiermeisterin hat darum gebeten, die Eide der Soldaten zu erneuern und sie wieder in Dienst zu stellen. Colonel Batoshski ist davon allerdings wenig begeistert. Es besteht aber Hoffnung, dass der Lord Captain seinen Respekt verdienen kann.

languages.text: La 32e Légion Pénale de Merov était autrefois au service de Seberian. La capitaine-quartier-maître a exigé que ses membres renouvellent leur serment avant de reprendre du service. Le colonel Batoshski, quant à lui, ne semble guère approuver cette décision. Mais tout n'est pas perdu, et {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} parviendra peut-être à gagner son respect.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

traits.locale_text: La 32e Légion Pénale de Merov était autrefois au service de Seberian. La capitaine-quartier-maître a exigé que ses membres renouvellent leur serment avant de reprendre du service. Le colonel Batoshski, quant à lui, ne semble guère approuver cette décision. Mais tout n'est pas perdu, et {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} parviendra peut-être à gagner son respect.

languages.text: 梅罗夫第32判罪军团曾效忠于塞贝里安。军需官上尉请求重新宣誓，让军团恢复建制。巴托什斯基上校对此前景颇为不满。不过，舰长大人仍有希望赢得他的尊重。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.

traits.locale_text: 梅罗夫第32判罪军团曾效忠于塞贝里安。军需官上尉请求重新宣誓，让军团恢复建制。巴托什斯基上校对此前景颇为不满。不过，舰长大人仍有希望赢得他的尊重。

languages.text: 32. Merov Ceza İnfaz Alayı, bir zamanlar Seberian'a hizmet etmişti. Levazımcı Yüzbaşı, yeminlerinin yenilenmesini ve tekrar hizmete alınmalarını talep etti. Ancak Albay Batoshski bu ihtimalden memnun değil. Lord Kaptan'ın onun saygısını kazanabileceğine dair hâlâ umut var.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Penal Regiment once served Seberian. The captain-quartermaster has requested that their oaths be renewed and they be taken back into service. However, Colonel Batoshski is displeased by the prospect. There is still hope that the Lord Captain can win his respect.
